description_html:
Storycraft is a narrative-driven challenge where time opens in both directions—past and future converge. Participants begin from a shared starting point and navigate a structured, graph-based journey, collecting story fragments and randomized game mechanics from different eras.
Ancient traditions, futuristic technologies, powerful abilities, and subtle constraints are gathered along each chosen path. Every decision shapes a unique narrative. Upon reaching the end, teams must present a coherent story that integrates all collected elements and mechanics.
And at the end of the journey—someone is waiting to meet you.

Judging Criteria (100%):

Each criterion carries 25% weightage.

  • Narrative Coherence
    • Smooth and logical flow of the story
    • Effective connection of multiple story fragments into one cohesive narrative
  • Integration of Game Mechanics
    • Creative and effective use of all collected game mechanics
    • Clear explanation of how mechanics influence the story
  • Creativity & Originality
    • Uniqueness of narrative choices and storytelling approach
  • Boss Encounter Execution
    • Logical and strategic use of acquired powers and mechanics
    • Clear explanation of how the boss is defeated

Team Composition:

  • Teams may consist of 1 to 3 members only

Mandatory Use of Mechanics:

  • Every story element and game mechanic collected during the event must be used in the final narrative.
  • Ignoring any collected mechanic may result in score deduction.

Presentation Guidelines:

  • Teams must present their final narrative within the time limit announced on the event day.

Judges’ Decision:

  • The judges’ decision will be final and binding.
